reviews.review_description:
Update........

Changed my score from a 4 to 5. I am truly impressed with the quick response from the developer.

Not even waiting on the update. I am just glad to see the developer cares about this great app.  

I think everyone over 40 should definitely get this app. It could save your  life by getting a very good presentation on the function of the heart and how it can be injured.  



Great learning method.  Quality is 10 / 10

Only first page out of three  videos are available. 

When will the remaining be available?

Feels like a demo at the moment

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your feedback and for pointing out the bug! We really appreciate you bringing it to our attention since it was something we didn’t expect. Your input helped us fix it quickly.

The goal of the app is to give people a clear look at what’s happening inside their heart and how it works. The issues we show in the app are serious, but they can often be prevented if we understand them better. Thanks again for your support!
